verdict_detail: 0 strategies passed all gates. Closest misses are listed below with the specific gates that rejected them.
common_failures: profit disappears after removing top 5% trades
profit disappears after removing top 1 trade
recommendations: no strategy survived the strict cert + critic + FDR gates; the closest misses are listed in near_misses below.

shuffle test fails on every spec — the per-trade returns carry no time-structure signal beyond their marginal distribution; longer M15 history is needed before edges can be statistically distinguished from random ordering.
random-baseline p-value above 0.05 on most specs — at this trade frequency a random direction sequence reproduces a similar Sharpe; selectivity needs to rise OR sample size.
>=70% of specs fall short of the 60% positive-fold gate; the underlying edge is regime-dependent — try regime_class filters (trend-only vs range-only) to focus the signal.
many specs trade <3 times/week; loosen filters or pick a less restrictive entry model to bring trade count up.
2 spec(s) flip negative under spread×1.5 / slippage×2 — those edges are not real-world tradable; reduce trade frequency or use limit orders so spread cost is amortised.
critic failure 'profit concentrated in 1 session' appears 14 time(s) across the leaderboard; investigate the trade ledger
critic failure 'profit disappears after removing top 5% trades' appears 13 time(s) across the leaderboard; investigate the trade ledger
critic failure 'profit disappears after removing top 1 trade' appears 11 time(s) across the leaderboard; investigate the trade ledger

single biggest unlock: more *same-broker* M5 history. Sub-M15 execution-model improvements (sweep_reclaim, minor_structure_break) cannot be fairly tested until that lands. See results/data_manifest.json -> known_gaps.
